name: Advanced Product Descriptions
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/servlet/rtaImage?eid=ka12x00000000CH&feoid=00N2800000JL2j1&refid=0EM2x000000L17y", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Not all themes support these fields by default, and may require a tweak to achieve your desired outcome."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on adds nine additional fields to your products, including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Short Description"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Specifications"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Warranty"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Terms and Conditions"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Internal Notes"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Author/Artists"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Type"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Format"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manufacturer Model Number"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These fields can display addition product information on your webstore, or be mapped to specific Amazon, Catch, or eBay fields to supply required data."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Neto partners can customise your theme to display these fields. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://forms.neto.com.au/services/designtweak.html?", "children": [{"text": "Contact a design partner"}]}, {"text": " for a consultation."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Advanced Product Descriptions Add-on"}], "data-id": "set-up-instructions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the Advanced Product Descriptions add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In\u00a0your Neto control panel, navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Advanced Product Descriptions", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on in the Product Management section."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm by clicking the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The add-on is now installed. You can populate the information in these fields "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products", "children": [{"text": "individually, or by the "}]}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "import wizard"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
